name: deeno/deeno
description: Flat-file CMS in PHP with no database: content in Markdown with a YAML header, runs on any shared hosting.

suggest.ext-gd: Photo optimization and thumbnail generation on media upload
suggest.ext-zip: Backups and installing themes/plugins from ZIP
suggest.ext-fileinfo: Checking the MIME type of uploaded files by content
suggest.ext-exif: Respecting EXIF orientation when processing photos

scripts-descriptions.test: Unit checks: pure logic (run.php) + file managers in a sandbox (managers.php)
scripts-descriptions.smoke: HTTP integration: spins up an isolated copy and hits real routes
